---
title: "Chỉ tiêu tài chính các NHTM"
format: 
  html:
    theme: 
      - flatly
      - assets/custom.scss
    toc: false
    embed-resources: false
    page-layout: custom
    css: assets/report-nav.css
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
---

```{r, echo=FALSE}
library(targets)
source("R/config.R")

# Tải danh sách dataframe đã được lưu cache trong targets pipeline
all_tables <- tar_read(all_tables)

# Unpack toàn bộ dataframe trong list ra môi trường Global Environment (.GlobalEnv)
invisible(list2env(all_tables, envir = .GlobalEnv))
```

::: {.report-nav}

::: {.nav-logo}
![](assets/logo.png)
:::

[Năng lực vốn](#năng-lực-vốn){.nav-item}
[Quy mô và chất lượng tài sản](#quy-mô-và-chất-lượng-tài-sản){.nav-item}
[Quản trị điều hành](#quản-trị-điều-hành){.nav-item}
[Hiệu quả](#hiệu-quả){.nav-item}
[Thanh khoản và cơ cấu tài sản](#thanh-khoản-và-cơ-cấu-tài-sản){.nav-item}

:::

::: {.report-section}

# Năng lực vốn

::: {.chart-grid}

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
source("charts/04. car.R")
chart_car
```
::::

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
source("charts/05. vcsh.R")
chart_vcsh
```
::::

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
source("charts/06. vcsh_tts.R")
chart_vcsh_tts
```
::::

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
source("charts/07. von_dieu_le.R")
chart_von_dieu_le
```
::::


:::

:::

::: {.report-section}

# Quy mô và chất lượng tài sản

::: {.chart-grid}

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
source("charts/08. tts.R")
chart_tts
```
::::

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
source("charts/09. tin_dung.R")
chart_tin_dung
```
::::

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
source("charts/10. thi_phan_tin_dung.R")
chart_thi_phan_tin_dung2
```
::::

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
chart_thi_phan_tin_dung1
```
::::

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
source("charts/11. huy_dong_von.R")
chart_huy_dong_von
```
::::

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
source("charts/12. thi_phan_tien_gui.R")
chart_thi_phan_tien_gui2
```
::::

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
chart_thi_phan_tien_gui1
```
::::

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
source("charts/13. ty_le_no_xau.R")
chart_ty_le_no_xau
```
::::

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
source("charts/14. quy_mo_no_xau.R")
chart_quy_mo_no_xau
```
::::

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
source("charts/15. ty_le_no_nhom_2.R")
chart_ty_le_no_nhom2
```
::::

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
source("charts/16. chi_phi_dprr.R")
chart_chi_phi_dprr
```
::::

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
source("charts/17. ty_le_bao_phu_no_xau.R")
chart_ty_le_bao_phu_no_xau
```
::::

:::

:::

::: {.report-section}

# Quản trị điều hành

::: {.chart-grid}

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
source("charts/18. cir.R")
chart_cir
```
::::

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
source("charts/19. cltc_binh_quan.R")
chart_cltc_binh_quan
```
::::

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
source("charts/20. lntt_binh_quan.R")
chart_lntt_binh_quan
```
::::

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
source("charts/21. chi_phi_nhan_vien_binh_quan.R")
chart_chi_phi_nhan_vien_binh_quan
```
::::

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
source("charts/22. chi_phi_nhan_vien_lntt.R")
chart_chi_phi_nhan_vien_lntt
```
::::

:::

:::

::: {.report-section}

# Hiệu quả

::: {.chart-grid}

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
source("charts/23. cltc_rieng.R")
chart_cltc_rieng
```
::::

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
source("charts/24. lntt_rieng.R")
chart_lntt_rieng
```
::::

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
source("charts/26. co_cau_thu_nhap.R")
chart_co_cau_thu_nhap1
```
::::

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
source("charts/27. thu_lai_rong.R")
chart_thu_lai_rong
```
::::

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
source("charts/28. ty_trong_thu_lai_rong.R")
chart_ty_trong_thu_lai_rong
```
::::

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
source("charts/29. lai_du_thu_thu_nhap_lai.R")
chart_lai_du_thu_thu_nhap_lai
```
::::

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
source("charts/30. lai_du_thu_no_nhom_1.R")
chart_lai_du_thu_no_nhom_1
```
::::

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
source("charts/31. co_cau_thu_ngoai_lai.R")
chart_co_cau_thu_ngoai_lai1
```
::::

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
source("charts/32. thu_dv_rong.R")
chart_thu_dv_rong
```
::::

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
source("charts/33. ty_trong_thu_dvr.R")
chart_ty_trong_thu_dvr
```
::::

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
source("charts/35. nim.R")
chart_nim
```
::::

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
source("charts/37. roa.R")
chart_roa
```
::::

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
source("charts/38. roe.R")
chart_roe
```
::::

:::

:::

::: {.report-section}

# Thanh khoản và cơ cấu tài sản

::: {.chart-grid}

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
source("charts/39. ty_le_du_no_huy_dong.R")
chart_ty_le_du_no_huy_dong
```
::::

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
source("charts/41. casa.R")
chart_casa
```
::::

:::: {.chart-item}
```{r}
source("charts/42. cho_vay_tdh_du_no.R")
chart_cho_vay_tdh_du_no
```
::::

:::

:::

```{=html}
<script>
// Scroll spy: highlight active nav item based on scroll position
(function() {
  const navItems = document.querySelectorAll('.report-nav .nav-item');
  const sections = [];
  
  navItems.forEach(function(item) {
    const href = item.getAttribute('href');
    if (href && href.startsWith('#')) {
      const id = href.substring(1);
      const target = document.getElementById(id);
      if (target) sections.push({ el: target, link: item });
    }
  });
  
  if (!sections.length) return;
  
  function onScroll() {
    const scrollY = window.scrollY + 80;
    let current = sections[0];
    
    for (let i = 0; i < sections.length; i++) {
      if (sections[i].el.offsetTop <= scrollY) {
        current = sections[i];
      }
    }
    
    navItems.forEach(function(item) { item.classList.remove('active'); });
    if (current) current.link.classList.add('active');
  }
  
  window.addEventListener('scroll', onScroll, { passive: true });
  onScroll();
})();
</script>
```
